text: A PHP and MySQL portal for managing opportunities, student applications, interview rounds, and placement reports.
textPreview: A PHP and MySQL portal for managing opportunities, student applications, interview rounds, and placement reports.

text: Demo path: Home -> Login -> Student Flow -> Admin Flow -> Reports
textPreview: Demo path: Home -> Login -> Student Flow -> Admin Flow -> Reports

text: The system connects students and placement administrators in one workflow.
textPreview: The system connects students and placement administrators in one workflow.

text:
Manual placement tracking is
slow, scattered, and hard to
report.
textPreview: Manual placement tracking is | slow, scattered, and hard to | report.

text:
A single portal handles
listings, applications,
status updates, and reports.
textPreview: A single portal handles | listings, applications, | status updates, and reports.

text:
Students apply and track
progress; admins manage
opportunities and results.
textPreview: Students apply and track | progress; admins manage | opportunities and results.

text: The application is divided into public, student, admin, and database modules.
textPreview: The application is divided into public, student, admin, and database modules.

text: Use XAMPP with Apache and MySQL, then open the portal from localhost.
textPreview: Use XAMPP with Apache and MySQL, then open the portal from localhost.

text:
MySQL uses localhost, root,
blank password, and port
3307.
textPreview: MySQL uses localhost, root, | blank password, and port | 3307.

text: The first screen shows latest opportunities and sends users to the right area.
textPreview: The first screen shows latest opportunities and sends users to the right area.

text:
index.php displays recent
opportunities and
login/register actions.
textPreview: index.php displays recent | opportunities and | login/register actions.

text:
login.php lets users choose
Student or Admin from one
form.
textPreview: login.php lets users choose | Student or Admin from one | form.

text:
Only student registration is
public; admin accounts are
seeded.
textPreview: Only student registration is | public; admin accounts are | seeded.

Shows totals, pending

text: The project uses PHP, MySQL, sessions, reusable includes, and Tailwind styling.

text:
PHP pages process forms, run
MySQL queries, and redirect
after actions.

text:
Sessions protect
student/admin pages;
passwords use hashing for
students.

text:
Tailwind CSS builds
responsive dashboards,
cards, forms, and tables.
